nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Oberländer's ground thrush
nodes.summary: Oberländer's ground thrush（Oberländer's ground thrush，学名 Geokichla oberlaenderi），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于刚果民主共和国、乌干达，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐、小种群风险。

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: 刚果民主共和国
nodes.summary: 刚果民主共和国是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联274种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Black guinea fowl、剛果孔雀等274种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 乌干达
nodes.summary: 乌干达是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联249种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Elgon francolin、Shelley's francolin等249种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The population size of Oberländer's ground thrush is not known but may be very small. It is declining because of habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species is threatened by forest degradation and deforestation. The IUCN Red List has listed the species as near threatened because it has a small, threatened range and possibly a very small population

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species is threatened by forest degradation and deforestation. The IUCN Red List has listed the species as near threatened because it has a small, threatened range and possibly a very small population
